title: mimih spirit in Djimubarn mimih spirit rock art context
publication_or_organisation: This Place: Djimubarn, sacred rock art shelter; ABC Education / Merrill Girrabul
australian_relation: ABC Education public transcript from an Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander education resource that explicitly discusses mimih spirits and human-figure rock art at Djimubarn.
evidence_summary: ABC Education's public transcript for This Place: Djimubarn says a rock-art image looks like a mimih spirit, discusses a human figure and man's face in the shelter, and says some of the very old paintings were maybe done by mimih spirits.
